prod-001.name: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe
prod-001.description: Bright and floral with notes of bergamot, lemon zest, and a honeyed finish. Washed process, grown at 1,800–2,200m in the Gedeo Zone.

prod-002.name: Sumatra Mandheling
prod-002.description: Earthy, full-bodied, and syrupy with notes of dark chocolate, cedar, and a hint of tobacco. Wet-hulled process from the Aceh highlands.

prod-003.name: House Blend No. 7
prod-003.description: Our signature daily drinker. 60% Colombian Huila for sweetness and body, 40% Brazilian Cerrado for nutty, chocolatey depth.
